subtitle: Upstream channel balance and availability. The engine never exposes a real upstream wallet balance, so coverage is stated honestly per channel type.
coverageNote: Only apikey/bedrock channels expose a real, admin-configured quota. Anthropic OAuth and account-pool channels have no balance API — the numbers shown for them are account-side daily-cost estimates, not balances.
degradedNote: Some sites could not be reached and are excluded from coverage counts:
noBalanceApi: No balance API for this channel type — estimate only
tableEmpty: No upstream channels found. Managed or newapi sites may not report balances.
thresholdOff: Low-balance alerting is off. Set RP_CHANNEL_BALANCE_THRESHOLD (USD) and restart to enable it for real-quota channels.
rechargeDesc: Read-only shortcuts to upstream recharge pages. Opening a link jumps to the upstream site in a new tab; top-ups are done there and reconciled manually. No quota reset or balance change is performed here.
rechargeUrlHint: Must start with http or https.
rechargeUrlInvalid: Every URL must be http or https
resetDisabledHint: Quota reset is disabled on the server. Set RP_UPSTREAM_RESET_ENABLED=1 and restart to enable it.
resetOnlyQuotaHint: Only real-quota channels have a usable quota interface
resetConfirmMessage: Irreversible: this zeroes the used-quota counter for this upstream channel, used after a top-up or renewal. It cannot be undone.
